title: Minimum Cuts to Divide a Circle
titleCn: 分割圆的最少切割次数

testcases.input: n = 4 Output: 2 Explanation: The above figure shows how cutting the circle twice through the middle divides it into 4 equal slices.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The above figure shows how cutting the circle twice through the middle divides it into 4 equal slices.

testcases.input: n = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: At least 3 cuts are needed to divide the circle into 3 equal slices. It can be shown that less than 3 cuts cannot result in 3 slices of equal size and shape. Also note that the first cut will not divide the circle into distinct parts.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: At least 3 cuts are needed to divide the circle into 3 equal slices. It can be shown that less than 3 cuts cannot result in 3 slices of equal size and shape. Also note that the first cut will not divide the circle into distinct parts.
